'''payobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reabatement|reabatement]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reabatement|reabatement]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| payobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæyebeth|pæyebeth]] || [[word:pæyebej|pæyebej]] || [[word:pæyebesh|pæyebesh]] || [[word:pæyebe|pæyebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:payoyoboth|payoyoboth]] || [[word:payoyoboj|payoyoboj]] || [[word:payoyobosh|payoyobosh]] || [[word:payoyobo|payoyobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:payoboth|payoboth]] || [[word:payoboj|payoboj]] || [[word:payobosh|payobosh]] || [[word:payobo|payobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:payofboth|payofboth]] || [[word:payofboj|payofboj]] || [[word:payofbosh|payofbosh]] || [[word:payofbof|payofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:payobotho|payobotho]] || [[word:payobojo|payobojo]] || [[word:payobosho|payobosho]] || [[word:payoboko|payoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:payoboth|payoboth]] || [[word:payoboj|payoboj]] || [[word:payobosh|payobosh]] || [[word:payobo|payobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:payobothol|payobothol]] || [[word:payobojol|payobojol]] || [[word:payoboshol|payoboshol]] || [[word:payobokol|payobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:payobothotho|payobothotho]] || [[word:payobojojo|payobojojo]] || [[word:payoboshosho|payoboshosho]] || [[word:payoboko|payoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:payobothon|payobothon]] || [[word:payobojon|payobojon]] || [[word:payoboshon|payoboshon]] || [[word:payobokon|payobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:payobothoro|payobothoro]] || [[word:payobojoro|payobojoro]] || [[word:payoboshoro|payoboshoro]] || [[word:payobokoro|payobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
